common.footer_disclaimer_text: The calculators and tools on SmartCalcTools are provided for educational and mathematical estimation purposes only. The outputs generated by this site do not constitute a Fatwa (religious ruling), personalized Shariah advisory, or legal/financial advice. Please consult with a qualified Islamic scholar or your local Shariah board before making binding financial decisions.
common.footer_copyright: © 2026 SmartCalcTools. Free tools built for speed, privacy, and ethics.

home.hero_title: Free Islamic Finance & Pro Dev Tools
home.hero_subtitle: Professional-grade calculators built on Halal principles and offline-first developer utilities. Run entirely in your browser. No signups, no data tracking, 100% private.
home.why_halal_desc: We refuse to build tools for Riba (Usury). All our financial calculators follow Islamic guidelines.
home.why_private_desc: All calculations run locally in your browser. Your financial data never leaves your device.
home.why_speed_desc: No server roundtrips. Get instant results as you type with modern web technologies.

about.title: About SmartCalcTools
about.subtitle: Empowering users with 100% private, fast, and secure tools.
about.mission_desc1: SmartCalcTools was born out of a simple necessity: the need for reliable, privacy-first web utilities. In an era where every piece of data is tracked, we decided to build a platform that respects your privacy by default.
about.mission_desc2: Whether you are a software developer needing to format JSON or decode a JWT, or a Muslim looking for mathematically precise, Sharia-compliant financial calculators, our tools run entirely in your browser. **No data leaves your device.**
about.zero_trust_desc: We use modern WebAssembly and WebGPU technologies to bring powerful capabilities directly to your browser. Our **Semantic PDF Search** tool downloads a multilingual AI model directly to your device's cache, allowing you to search highly sensitive documents (like NDAs or tax returns) without ever sending the file to a cloud server.
about.islamic_finance_desc: Our financial calculators (Zakat, Murabaha, Mudarabah, Islamic FIRE) are built with strict adherence to Islamic Fiqh principles. We consult standard AAOIFI guidelines and use real-time gold APIs to ensure absolute precision, avoiding the common interest-based assumptions found in conventional financial tools.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We'd love to hear from you.
contact.desc: Have a question, feedback, or a feature request for a new calculator or tool? Send us a message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1_desc1: At SmartCalcTools, we take a radical approach to privacy: **we collect absolutely nothing**. All of our tools, including the Semantic PDF Search, JSON Formatter, and Password Generator, run 100% locally in your web browser.
privacy.section1_desc2: When you upload a file or paste sensitive text, it never leaves your device. We do not have servers that process your data.
privacy.section2_desc1: To keep the lights on, we use non-invasive analytics (like basic page views) and may display contextual advertisements. These third-party services (such as Google AdSense) may use cookies or similar technologies to serve ads based on your visit.
privacy.section2_desc2: **Crucially:** These third parties have zero access to the data you process within our tools. The execution context of our calculators and AI models is strictly isolated.
privacy.section3_desc: Some tools may use your browser's local storage to save your preferences (like Dark Mode settings). This data remains on your device and can be cleared at any time through your browser settings.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1_desc: By accessing and using SmartCalcTools, you accept and agree to be bound by the terms and provisions of this agreement.
terms.section2_desc1: The tools provided on this website, including but not limited to the Islamic Finance Calculators (Zakat, Murabaha, Mudarabah, Islamic FIRE), are for educational and informational purposes only.
terms.section2_desc2: **No Financial or Religious Advice:** We are not certified financial planners, nor are we Islamic scholars (Muftis). The results generated by our calculators are mathematical approximations based on general guidelines (e.g., AAOIFI standards). You must consult a qualified scholar or financial advisor before making actual financial decisions.
terms.section3_desc: Our services are provided 'as is' without warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including without limitation warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. We are not liable for any calculation errors or direct/indirect damages arising from the use of our tools.

zakat.title: 🤲 Zakat Calculator
zakat.subtitle: Calculate your annual Zakat (2.5%) easily and accurately according to Islamic guidelines. No data is saved.
zakat.nisab_description: Based on current global market prices for 85 grams of Gold.
zakat.api_failed: ⚠️ Could not fetch live gold prices. Please enter the Nisab value manually based on 85g gold price in your local currency.
zakat.status_eligible: 🎉 Your net assets exceed the Nisab threshold. You are eligible to pay Zakat.
zakat.status_not_eligible: ℹ️ Your net assets are below the Nisab threshold. You are not required to pay Zakat.
zakat.note1: Nisab is the minimum amount of wealth a Muslim must possess for a full lunar year (Hawl) before Zakat becomes due.
zakat.note2: Nisab is equivalent to 85 grams of gold or 595 grams of silver. This calculator uses 85g of gold as the default standard.
zakat.note3: Zakat is calculated at 2.5% of your net cumulative wealth above the Nisab.
zakat.note4: Debts and immediate expenses should be deducted from your total assets before calculating Zakat.

qibla.title: Live Qibla Tracker 🕋
qibla.subtitle: 100% Native, Institutional-Grade Qibla Direction (Zero Third-Party Scripts).
qibla.location_permission_desc: We need access to your device's location to calculate the exact direction of the Kaaba mathematically.
qibla.geolocation_unsupported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser.
qibla.permission_denied: Compass permission denied. Please allow it in settings.
qibla.location_denied: Location access denied. We need your location to calculate the Qibla.
qibla.no_sensors_desc: Your device does not have motion sensors (Gyroscope/Magnetometer).
qibla.direction_from_north: Exact Qibla Direction from True North
qibla.physical_compass_instruction: Use any physical compass and point it to the degree above.
qibla.turn_device: Turn your device to find the Qibla

murabaha.markup_note: This is a fixed markup added to the cost, not compounding interest.

mudarabah.title: 📈 Mudarabah Profit Calculator
mudarabah.subtitle: Calculate capital returns and profit-split ratios for Sharia-compliant partnerships.
mudarabah.loss_warning_desc: In a Mudarabah contract, financial losses must be borne entirely by the Capital Provider (Rab-al-Mal). The Manager (Mudarib) loses their time and effort, unless negligence or breach of contract is proven.
